Tech Stack: Python, YOLOv8, EasyOCR, PaddleOCR, TrOCR, HAT, DarkIR, RealESRGAN, X-Restormer
Project Title: MPhil Thesis: Automatic License Plate Recognition (ALPR)
Description: Research-grade ALPR system achieving 95.11% OCR accuracy (PSNR 30.40 dB, SSIM 0.8922). Pipeline: YOLOv8 detection → DarkIR for night image brightening (threshold=100) → HAT super-resolution upscaling → RealESRGAN for blur removal → ensemble of EasyOCR, PaddleOCR, TrOCR with post-processing.
